title: Assorted Decor
description: A random assortment of decorum to add to your Minecraft world.
body:
# Assorted Decor [Forge/Fabric]   ### Versions 8.0.0 and newer now require [Assorted Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/assorted-lib)
This contains an assortment of new decorations to add to your world.   Documentation can be found at: https://assortedmods.com/decor   ![New decoration blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DyXZJYKu/images/7cae438115365f77ee5de0c33b7c5ca744275e9c.png) Currently adds many blocks called Colorizers. These when used with the Colorizer wand will allow you to set the texture of any of the blocks to a supported blocks texture. Current colorizer types are: Colorizer Blocks: ``` - Block - Chair - Table - Counter - Stool - Fence - Fence Gate - Wall - Trap Door - Door - Slab - Stairs - Lamp Post ``` Slope Blocks: ``` - Slope - Sloped Angle - Sloped Intersection - Oblique Slope - Corner - Slanted Corner - Pyramid - Full Pyramid - Sloped Post ``` Fireplace Blocks: ``` - Chimney - Fireplace - Firering - Stove - Firepit - Firepit Covered ```   Besides the colorizer blocks there are also Wallpapers as well as Wood and Iron Frames that you can place on your walls to add something extra. Also in Assorted Decor is the Neon Sign which allows you to write colored text as well as the other possible Text Formatting available on signs. ![Neon Signs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DyXZJYKu/images/59cfa81a9d7d78d9abbb2f558a0b881b9bd4686f.png) ### Recent Additions: ``` - Sidewalks, Stone paths, and Decorative Stone - Roadway, Roadway Manholes, Roadway Lights - Vertical and Horizontal Siding - Illumination Plates - Bone and Clay Decorations - Paper, Bone, and Iron Lanterns - Glass, Steel, and Chain Link Doors - Chain Link Fence - Fountain - Paint Rollers (The ability to color roadways, wool, concrete, concrete powder, carpet, fluro, siding blocks, wallpaper, frames, and sheep) ```
